name: Swiss-Belinn Airport Surabaya
detail: I booked this hotel on my last day in Surabaya due to my early flight. During the time I stay,the hotel provided excellent service and there's also free shuttle bus to go to the Airport which is very convenient. Variety choice of breakfast and staffs there were very active.

name: Grand Swiss-Belhotel Darmo
detail: Starting from the check in until the room, all is wonderful!

name: Hotel Ciputra World Surabaya managed by Swiss-Belhotel International
detail: Perfect as always...Will not go to other hotel in Surabaya...Ciputra is the newest 5-star hotel in Surabaya...clean, friendly staff, beautifully decorated room...Best of all the hotel is located just above Ciputra World Mall Surabaya...What more can you expect...You have everything that you need just right at your door step...5 thumbs up!!!

name: My Studio Hotel City Center
detail: I am familiar with the hostel concept and have tried some places abroad, but this was the first time in Indonesia. The place was clean, very close to exhibition site, which I was working at during my stay. The bathroom number is enough to accommodate the guests, since there is 4 extra bathrooms on the 4th floor. I took the double bed one, which is spacious enough for a single person. The breakfast was only bread and coffee / tea. If it doesn't fill you enough, you can buy additional breakfast online (via go-food), and have breakfast at the common room. I bought Mcd big breakfast every morning, and the total was still cheaper than staying in a hotel+breakfast. You can also put drinks in the lobby's fridge. I will get back here on my next trip to Surabaya.

name: Livinn Hostel City Center Surabaya
detail: I'm a photographer, after doing my project in Surabaya I extend my trip for 1 day to take photo in Surabaya. Livinn is an excellent choice since the location is near places of interest. The staff is no doubt one of the best staff hostel I ever visit, friendly & helpful. Some of my concern are the toilet in 2nd floor is wet & stink, there's no soap available. I woke up 5am because of the noise and hot. The noise is because there are 2 big group was staying there, most of them is senior citizen, I think they not used to stay in backpacker hostel that have some basic rules like noice etc, early in the morning these 2 groups is getting ready to do their activity. My pod is hot because the AC suddenly not working properly, so I asked the staff downstairs and they quickly fixed the AC. One of the reasons I decided to stay here is I saw the photo that they have locker and smart card (I need it because I want to leave my laptop), turn out they only have 4 locker for one room.

name: Swiss Belinn Tunjungan
detail: This new hotel was located in Business Center District, opposite with Tunjungan Plaza, so it is so suitable for Shopper to enjoy Surabaya more than you could imagine. I like how they design this hotel since when you enter this hotel you could see directly the lobby and restaurant it is in the same place, so it will directly increase your appetite to try to eat their Food & Beverages. During the breakfast, I saw how fast response the staff to set up and clean the table, the menu for breakfast is so variety, esp Indonesia traditional food, so for the traveler who want to eat Javanese food, you may have it in this hotel even western breakfast. The fast response also shown on House Keeping Services and F&B Services. So as a new hotel, I could see how they are in very well trained.

name: Vasa Hotel Surabaya
detail: The Vasa Hotel is a well known and good hotel in Surabaya. One of my favourites. The reception works professionally, with good explanations. So it takes a little time, but then you know all you want to know. The rooms are modern and nice with enough amenities. The pool is nice , be warned it is a not smoking area. Smoking rooms are availlable, so no problem. The breakfast is excellent, with many choices for both westerners as asian alike. The parking and parking system is some special, but and it is better to take and deliver your suitcases in the front. The security should do more efforts when you leave the hotel because it is a busy road. Be careful with the motorcycles passing. Further - again. worthwile ton stay. Will come back.

name: Hotel Majapahit Surabaya MGallery
detail: One of the best stay I've experienced. Noticed this hotel when I was looking for the tourism spot in Surabaya. It was mentioned one of the historical building is now became a hotel. Checked the info and highly intrigued. I was mesmerized by the history of this hotel and how it is preserved. The structure is still the same as maybe 100 years ago. It is amazing how they preserved all the beautiful details and nuance. The beautiful garden in inside is beautifully maintained and can be enjoyed from the balcony. All the staffs were nice and helpful. I took the Heritage hotel tour and got the opportunity to peek the 2 storey Presidential Suite. Will definitely come back to this hotel when I visit Surabaya in the future so I can enjoy all the facilities and comfort. Staying in this hotel is not just a stay. It is an experience and exploration to the reminiscence of the past and history. Indonesia needs more historical hotel like this

name: Lively Hotel City Center Surabaya
detail: Harga affordable tapi pelayanan dan fasilitas top notch

name: Swiss-Belinn Manyar
detail: My family and I truly enjoyed our stay at Swiss-Belinn Surabaya! This was our first time to try this hotel and we absolutely loved it. In fact, I'm planning to book my stay in Jakarta at Swiss-Belinn. The location is fantastic with so many great restaurants along the street...All within walking distance. Oh and they are very serious about the interior design of the hotel! So elegant! The only issue I had with my stay was noise from upstairs. I guess the ceiling is slightly thin or not so sound proof as I could quite clearly hear dragging of chairs and people's voices. But it wasn't to a bothering level. All in all, Swiss-Belinn is best bang for the buck hotel!
